channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping not removed, 15th April
item.description:
Someone has left more rubbish in Parkside road alongside 52 Stanmore road Its now been ripped open by foxes and possibly rats There are also gas canister cans in the rubbish that can be seen too

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkside Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verges have not been cut this year, 15th April
item.description:
Grass verges in Brookmead Way and adjoining streets have not been cut for ages and are overgrown
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookmead Way, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 15th April
item.description:
Please remove fly tip near coop carpark.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dittisham Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Both cars dumped by member of the street both untaxed and suspected stolem, 15th April
item.description:
See photo

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holmcroft Way, Southborough, Greater London

item.title: Untaxed and suspected vehicle dumped by member of street, 15th April

Outside church

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holmcroft Way, Southborough, Greater London

item.title: Fly Tip - Close to Bin area, 15th April
item.description:
Fly Tip - Close to Bin area Opposite 13 to 24 Priestley Close. Bed & Furniture.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priestley Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly Tipping inside Hackney Housing Building

item.title: The recently planted tree has, sadly, died. Please remove it and replant with a more suitable tree., 15th April
item.description:
The Magnolia Grandiflora recently planted outside No33 Towncourt Crescent has, sadly, not survived. Please can this dead tree be removed and a more suitable tree planted to replace it?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Towncourt Crescent, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smashed Glass on fw & cw, 15th April
item.description:
Smashed Glass on fw & cw OS 23 Kingsground

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsground, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign fallen and totally blocking pavement, 15th April
item.description:
'Controlled zone' sign and post have fallen over and now blocking pavement at junction of Blandford Rd with Churchfields Rd. V dangerous for pedestrians especially visually impaired people.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blandford Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Soak away drain filled in with Tarmac, 15th April
item.description:
I have reported this problem before outside our home at 63 Clapham Common North Side, London SW4 9SB. The soak away outside our front gate has been filled with Tarmac by TfL or similar organisation. This means that when it rains, there is a large puddle outside our front gate. My husband is 81 years old and cannot jump across this puddle. Please can somebody come to remove the Tarmac filling and replace the drain cover that was there previously? There is also flooding along the pavement when the rainfall is particularly heavy.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clapham Common North Side, Clapham Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dipped road / drive surface, 15th April
item.description:
Repaired area around manhole cover looks as though it has buckled.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1D, Mountfield Way, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Conifer needles and rubbish, 15th April
item.description:
I have previously made a report about this but nothing has been done

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grazeley Close, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large black fridge freezer, 15th April
item.description:
This fridge has been left on the pavement for a few days in front of Kendall Court. The people that left it have wedged a stick under it but it is precariously leaning towards the pavement and is not safe
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 15th April
item.description:
Two mattresses on coxmount road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Lane, Charlton

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wood's Road, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Dead fox, 15th April
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Westhurst Drive, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The bin is the wrong place and always overflowing, 15th April
item.description:
This bin has been moved to the thinner part of the pavement causing accessibility issues and when the commercial waste is piled up around it you can't even walk on the pavement. It needs to be moved higher up towards Great Eastern Street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Garden Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped at cossall park, 15th April
item.description:
Same place as usual

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wood's Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bike blocking pavement, 15th April
item.description:
Abandoned Lime bike blocking pavement on Robert Street South near Adelphi Building.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-3, Robert Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Metal fencing left in lake at Trent Park, 15th April
item.description:
Metal fencing still in Trent park lake below main house. Gardens now open but fencing not removed. This presents a major hazard to wildlife especially ducks and ducklings

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wigston Drive, Barnet
Report on FixMyStreet
